Judul Lowongan: INTERNSHIP 2026 - PT Pertamina (Persero) - Fungsi Transformasi Keberlanjutan Bisnis (Sustainability Policy & Governance)
Jurusan: International Relations, Economics, Communications, Teknik Industri, Manajemen
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:
Assist in gathering and verifying sustainability data from various departments.
Support the preparation of sustainability reports, ensuring compliance with industry standards and regulations (e.g., GRI, CDP, SASB)
Assist in the preparation of submissions for sustainability ratings (e.g MSCI, Sustainalytics)
Maintain records and documentation related to sustainability data and reporting
Help organize and participate in meetings and workshops related to sustainability reporting
Persyaratan:
Tingkat Pendidikan : S1
Jurusan : International Relations, Economics, Communications, Industrial Engineering, Management
Strong interest in sustainability & business issues
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Previous experience in event planning or project management
Basic knowledge of data analysis and reporting

Judul Lowongan: INTERNSHIP 2026 - PT Pertamina (Persero) - Fungsi Transformasi Keberlanjutan Bisnis (Sustainability Embedment & Partnership)
Jurusan: International Relations, Economics, Communications, Teknik Industri, Manajemen, Hukum
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:
Assist in the development and implementation of sustainability culture and engagement programs
Create content for internal communications, including newsletters and emails, to promote sustainability efforts.
Engage with employees to gather feedback and encourage participation in sustainability programs.
Assist in organizing and facilitating workshops, meetings, and training sessions.
Collaborate with external partners and stakeholders on sustainability projects.
Conduct research on sustainability regulations, policies, and emerging legal developments.
Monitor ESG, climate, energy transition, and sustainability reporting
Persyaratan:
.
Support the development and review of sustainability policies, guidelines, and governance documents.
Assist in legal and policy assessments for sustainability initiatives and partnerships.
Coordinate with internal and external stakeholders on sustainability-related matters.
Prepare briefing notes, presentations, and management materials.
Conduct benchmarking on sustainability best practices and industry trends.
Requirements
Tingkat Pendidikan : S1
Jurusan : International Relations, Economics, Communications, Industrial Engineering, Management, Hukum
Strong interest in sustainability & business issues
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
Previous experience in event planning or project management
Basic knowledge of data analysis and reporting

Judul Lowongan: INTERNSHIP 2026 - PT Pertamina (Persero) - Fungsi SDM (HSE Training Center)
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:
Melaksanakan pencatatan, pengelolaan, dan pelaporan keuangan perusahaan secara akurat dan tepat waktu sesuai dengan standar akuntansi yang berlaku.
Mengelola dan mengembangkan strategi pemasaran yang efektif untuk meningkatkan brand awareness, pertumbuhan penjualan, serta memperkuat posisi perusahaan di pasar
Persyaratan:
Tingkat Pendidikan : D4/S1
Jurusan : Accounting, Manajemen Marketing
Memahami prinsip dan standar akuntansi.
Mengelola dokumen keuangan secara sistematis dan rapi.
Mampu melakukan analisis data keuangan sederhana.
Menguasai Microsoft Excel (pivot, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, formula dasar).
Teliti & Detail → Memastikan akurasi data dan meminimalkan kesalahan.
Mampu menganalisis pasar dan menentukan strategi pemasaran yang tepat.
Memiliki kemampuan presentasi yang baik kepada stakeholder.
Mampu bekerja lintas fungsi (Sales, Operasional, Finance).
Penyusunan rencana marketing (annual & quarterly plan).
Digital Marketing

Mampu menggunakan Microsoft Excel dan PowerPoint dengan baik.

Judul Lowongan: INTERNSHIP 2026 - PT Pertamina (Persero) - Fungsi Technology Innovation and Implementation (Power Development & Storage Management Research)

Bekerja sama dalam supporting kegiatan desain engineering, simulasi, dan uji performa pada sistem mekanik dan formulasi kimia.
Bekerja sama dalam supporting kegiatan penyusunan kelengkapan administratif kegiatan riset

Tingkat Pendidikan : S1
Jurusan : Teknik Mesin, Teknik Kimia, Kimia
Basic knowledge mechanical or chemical
Basic HSSE
MS Office, Mechanical Design & Fluid Mechanics, or Chemical Process Design & Simulation
